chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5647 of 2024 M/s.Rahima Food Products...... v/s.......Federation of Pakistan & others _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________ 1.For hearing of Misc.No.26624/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 13-12-2024. Ms.Saify Ali Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alezeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Ms.Masooda Siraj & Mr.M.Nazir Abbasi, Advocates for Respondent No.4. Mr.Azar Ahmed, Entomologist, Department of Plant Protection, Government of Pakistan is present. --- The grievance of the petitioner is that it is seeking examination of certain consignments by the Respondent No.2 and 3. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that an appropriate application shall be made before the concerned respondents to such effect. Mr.Azar Ahmed, Entomologist, Department of Plant Protection, Government of Pakistan is present on behalf of respondent Nos.2 and 3 states that upon receipt of such application the same shall be decided in accordance with law after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner by speaking order. As suggested, the petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
